description_long: This object consists of two stacked, cylindrical wooden containers, each with a flat, circular lid and reinforced with darker wooden bands at the top and bottom. The upper container is smaller and sits centered atop the larger lower container, creating a tiered appearance. Both containers feature prominent bail handles attached with visible metal fasteners, allowing for easy carrying or lifting. The wood grain texture is clearly visible, giving the object a rustic, hand-crafted look, and the coloration ranges from a medium to dark brown. The lids fit snugly, suggesting the containers are designed to keep contents secure and protected from the environment. The overall construction and finish indicate durability and suitability for storage or transport of goods in an urban or semi-industrial setting.
description: A pair of stacked, round wooden buckets with fitted lids, reinforced bands, and bail handles, featuring a rustic brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked cylindrical shape, both lids, and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bail handles on both containers, attached with metal fasteners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both handles in a raised position and the full curvature of the containers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with both handles visible, one slightly angled outward.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: wooden reinforcement bands at top and bottom
